title: Content Angle
description: An angle developed from a topic using the Contrast Formula (common belief -> surprising truth), platform-specific.

topic_id.description: Reference to the source topic ID

platform.description: Target platform this angle is optimized for

contrast.description: The Contrast Formula: common belief (A) -> surprising truth (B)

common_belief.description: What the audience currently believes (must be genuine, not a strawman)

surprising_truth.description: The insight that changes how they think (must be backed by evidence)

contrast_strength.description: How big the gap is between A and B

target_audience.description: Specific audience segment this angle speaks to

pain_addressed.description: What pain this addresses (time, money, complexity, status)

proof_method.description: How you'll prove the surprising truth (demo, data, before/after, case study)

funnel_direction.description: CTA and monetization guidance for this angle

monetization_tie.description: How this connects to monetization strategy

competitor_angles.description: How competitors approached this topic and how this angle differs

content_job.description: Primary content job this angle serves (from Sam Gaudet's framework)

blocker_destroyed.description: Text of the audience lie being destroyed by this angle, or empty string if no match
